channel.title: Image Classification on Machine Learning With Julia
channel.description: Recent content in Image Classification on Machine Learning With Julia

item.title: MNIST
item.description: Description Yes, you’ve seen this a hundred times before, but who am I to break tradition? Notebook

item.title: Cats Vs Dogs
item.description: Description Can you tell the difference between a cat and a dog? Of course you can! Unfortunately, computers generally struggle with this sort of thing. Thankfully, Flux is here to save the day! Our dataset conists of 25,000 images equally split between cats and dogs. For the sake of this demonstration, we will only use 5000 of these. This tutorial will show you how to build a custom data pipeline compatible with the Flux ecosystem.
